name: Stalker Portals Integrator
description: Integrate Stalker IPTV portals using URL and MAC address. Translates portals into standard M3U accounts and VOD libraries with selective sync, pre-import category/keyword filters, random testing, scheduling, and new entry markers.
author: Antigravity

fields.label: --- Single Portal Configuration ---
fields.description: Configure a single portal here. If you want multiple portals, use the JSON list field below.

fields.label: Portal Name
fields.help_text: A friendly name for this portal.

fields.label: MAC Address
fields.help_text: Your MAG device MAC address (should start with 00:1A:79).

fields.label: User-Agent Override
fields.help_text: Optional: Override the default MAG User-Agent.

fields.label: --- Multiple Portals Configuration ---
fields.description: Configure multiple portals. Enter either a simple text list or a JSON array. If either is non-empty, the single portal settings above are ignored.

fields.label: Portals List (One per line)
fields.help_text: Format: Name | URL | MAC | User-Agent (optional). Example: Portal 1 | http://example.com/c/ | 00:1A:79:11:22:33

fields.label: --- Detailed Sync Content Selection ---
fields.description: Choose exactly what components of the portal you want to synchronize.

fields.label: Synchronize Live TV
fields.help_text: If enabled, Live TV channels from Stalker portals will be synchronized.

fields.label: Synchronize Movies (VOD)
fields.help_text: If enabled, VOD movies from Stalker portals will be synchronized.

fields.label: Synchronize TV Series
fields.help_text: If enabled, TV Series and all their episodes will be synchronized.

fields.label: --- Pre-Import Sync Filters (Category & Keywords) ---
fields.description: Exclude or include categories and title keywords before import. Filtering happens prior to stream testing, saving time.

fields.label: Category Whitelist
fields.help_text: Comma-separated list of categories to import. If empty, all categories are allowed.

fields.label: Category Blacklist
fields.help_text: Comma-separated list of categories to completely skip.

fields.label: Title Keyword Blacklist
fields.help_text: Comma-separated list of keywords. Channels, movies, or series containing these in their title will be ignored.

fields.label: Mark New Entries with 🆕
fields.help_text: If enabled, newly imported channels, movies, and series will be prefixed with 🆕 in their names.

fields.label: --- Testing Configuration ---
fields.description: Configure the random stream testing settings.

fields.label: Test Sample Size
fields.help_text: Number of random items of each type (channels, movies, episodes) to test and import.

fields.label: --- Automatic Daily Sync Schedule ---
fields.description: Configure when you want this plugin to automatically synchronize in the background.

fields.label: Cron Sync Schedule
fields.help_text: A standard 5-field crontab expression. Default '0 3 * * *' triggers sync every night at 3:00 AM.

fields.label: Local Stream Host
fields.help_text: The address where ArgusFlix is locally accessible. Use http://127.0.0.1:5656 for local dev or http://web:9191 for docker.

actions.label: Sync & Test Stalker Portal
actions.description: Connects to Stalker portals, fetches all selected channels/movies/series, filters them, selects a random sample of each, tests their streams, and imports the working ones into ArgusFlix.
